title: Majesty
description: Forged behind muddied barnyards and royal kingdoms... an unforgiving rpg set in the late middle ages
body:
# **MAJESTY**
**FOR VERSION 1.20.1**

""_b side middle age deliverance rpg II dragon simulator_""

**MAJESTY** began as a fork off my other modpack, [**ADVENTURE MOD**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adventure-mod) (3 heart survival)
I'd excluded a ton of medieval mods and other types of mods in favor of other ideas for that pack... here, i used that framework & gave it a different coat

Leaning toward a bit more less intensive and grounded RPG, easing back heavily on the fantasy/dimensional stuff, this here's experience is centered around the middle ages, knights, kings, crowns, cannons...

### **INFORMATION**

**VERSIONS**

**Please** pay attention to which version you download considering your pc specs, it is recommended to allocate **3-10GB** of memory... preloading using [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) helps performance, here is an example command: _/chunky start minecraft:overworld circle 0 0 400 400_

- **MAIN** is around 100 mods
- **CONQUEST** includes support for Conquest Reforged & is very intensive

### MODLISTS & CREDITS

**SHOUTOUT TO EVERY MOD, RESOURCEPACK & SHADERPACK CREATOR, THIS CURATED MODPACK WOULDN'T EXIST WITHOUT THEIR HARDWORK, PLEASE CHECK OUT ALL THESE PAGES AND THE AUTHOR'S WORKS**

**PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE CONSIDER DOWNLOADING THE MODS THAT COULDN'T BE EMBEDDED DUE TO MODRINTH POLICIES, THAT WILL BE THE FULL INTENDED EXPERIENCE <3.**
